Backend Engineer.description: Designs and builds server-side systems, APIs, and data layers.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; builds CRUD endpoints under guidance; basic SQL.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns services end-to-end; designs schemas; writes runbooks.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs distributed systems; mentors; leads architecture reviews.

Frontend Engineer.description: Builds user-facing web interfaces with attention to UX, accessibility, and performance.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; implements designs from Figma; basic state management.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns features; writes reusable components; performance-aware.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; sets frontend architecture; design systems; cross-team standards.

Full-Stack Engineer.description: Ships complete features across frontend, backend, and infrastructure.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; ships small features end-to-end with help.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns features fully; comfortable across the stack.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; founder-mode capable; sets technical direction for products.

Mobile iOS Developer.description: Builds native iOS applications, focusing on UX, battery, and platform conventions.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; builds screens under guidance; basic networking.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns features; understands memory & lifecycle.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; leads architecture (TCA/Clean), publishes apps, mentors.

Mobile Android Developer.description: Builds native Android applications with Kotlin, Jetpack, and modern architecture.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; clean architecture; offline-first; CI/CD owner.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; modularizes apps; mentors; cross-platform tradeoffs.

React Native Developer.description: Builds cross-platform mobile apps in React Native, bridging iOS and Android nuances.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; bridges native modules; ships to both stores.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; new architecture (Fabric/TurboModules); perf-tunes.

Data Engineer.description: Builds data pipelines, warehouses, and platforms that power analytics and ML.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; writes SQL transforms; runs simple DAGs.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns pipelines; partition/cost tuning; data contracts.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs lakehouse architectures; streaming systems.

Data Scientist.description: Frames business problems statistically and ships models or insights to production.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; runs analyses with guidance; basic ML.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; designs experiments; productionizes simple models.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; sets DS strategy; influences product; mentors.

Data Analyst.description: Turns data into decisions via dashboards, ad-hoc analysis, and stakeholder partnership.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; partners with PMs; designs metrics; advanced SQL.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; builds analytics frameworks; influences org strategy.

common_gaps: Can't tell a story with data

Analytics Engineer.description: Bridges data engineering and analysis — owns the modeling layer (dbt) for trustworthy data.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns marts; sets data quality standards.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs the semantic layer; mentors analysts.

common_gaps: Treats dbt as just SQL templates — no testing/docs

ML Engineer.description: Productionizes machine-learning models — owns training pipelines, serving, and reliability.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; trains baseline models; basic deployment.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns end-to-end pipelines; eval frameworks.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs model platforms; on-call for ML systems.

MLOps Engineer.description: Builds the platform that lets ML teams train, deploy, and monitor models reliably.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; supports ML infra under guidance.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns model deployment platforms; SLOs for inference.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs ML platforms; cross-team standards.

common_gaps: Strong DevOps but weak ML understanding

NLP Engineer.description: Builds language-understanding systems — classification, NER, retrieval, and generation.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns domain adaptation; eval suites; productionizes.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs NLP systems; publishes or mentors.

Computer Vision Engineer.description: Builds vision systems — detection, segmentation, tracking, multi-sensor fusion.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; productionizes; latency budgets; sensor calibration.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs perception stacks; multi-modal fusion.

LLM Engineer.description: Builds applications on top of large language models — RAG, agents, evals, and serving.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; productionizes pipelines; evals and observability.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs agent systems; fine-tunes; cost optimizes.

AI Research Engineer.description: Bridges research and engineering — implements papers, runs ablations, ships novel methods.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; runs novel experiments; first-author papers possible.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; sets research direction; mentors; conference presence.

common_gaps: No engineering rigor — code is throwaway

DevOps Engineer.description: Automates infrastructure, CI/CD, and developer experience.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns IaC; manages clusters; DR drills.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; platform engineering; cross-team paved roads.

Site Reliability Engineer.description: Owns reliability — SLOs, on-call, incident response, capacity, and engineering for resilience.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; runs incidents; writes postmortems; owns SLOs.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; designs reliability programs; cross-team org-level work.

Cloud Architect.description: Designs cloud architectures balancing cost, security, performance, and compliance.

seniority.junior: Rare at this level — usually mid+.
seniority.mid: 5-8 yrs; designs single-account architectures; cost-aware.
seniority.senior: 8+ yrs; multi-account landing zones; regulated industries.

common_gaps: Theoretical only — no large-scale migration experience

Platform Engineer.description: Builds internal developer platforms (IDPs) — paved roads, golden paths, self-service infra.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns platform components; runs office hours.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; product mindset for the platform; org-wide adoption.

common_gaps: Treats platform as project, not product

Security Engineer.description: Embeds security into systems — appsec, infrastructure hardening, and incident response.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns appsec program; threat models products.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; sets security strategy; incident command.

Penetration Tester.description: Performs authorized offensive security testing to find vulnerabilities before attackers do.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; web app testing under guidance.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; leads engagements; OSCP-level skills.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; red team ops; advanced certs (OSEP, GXPN).

Database Administrator.description: Owns the operational health of databases — performance, availability, backups, security.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; replication topologies; query plan analysis.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; tier-1 systems; cross-DB consolidation.

QA Engineer.description: Validates quality through manual and exploratory testing, bug reproduction, and process.

seniority.junior: 0-2 yrs; runs test cases; logs bugs.
seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; designs test plans; risk-based testing.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; QA strategy across teams; mentors automation engineers.

common_gaps: Treats QA as gatekeeping not enabling

Test Automation Engineer.description: Designs and maintains automated test suites at unit, integration, and E2E levels.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns test pyramid; perf testing.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; sets automation strategy; coaches dev teams.

Embedded Systems Engineer.description: Builds firmware and embedded software for resource-constrained devices.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns firmware modules; bring-up; debug.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; system architecture; HW/SW co-design.

Game Developer.description: Builds interactive game experiences — gameplay programming, engines, and tools.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns systems; performance budgets.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; tech lead; engine internals; multi-platform.

common_gaps: Hobby projects only — no shipped title

Blockchain Engineer.description: Builds decentralized applications, smart contracts, and on-chain protocols.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; ships audited protocols; gas optimization.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; protocol architecture; pre-audit reviews; mentor.

Solutions Architect.description: Designs end-to-end technical solutions for clients, balancing requirements and constraints.

seniority.mid: 5-8 yrs; owns mid-size solution designs.
seniority.senior: 8+ yrs; presales + delivery; multi-region; enterprise customers.

Engineering Manager.description: Leads software engineering teams — people management, delivery, and technical direction.

seniority.mid: 7+ yrs IC + 2+ yrs mgmt; leads single team.
seniority.senior: 10+ yrs; leads multiple teams; org strategy.

common_gaps: Pure project manager — lacks technical depth

Technical Product Manager.description: Owns product roadmap with deep technical fluency — common in API, infra, and developer tools.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns a product area; metrics-driven.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; sets product strategy; multi-team.

common_gaps: No technical depth — can't engage engineers

Developer Relations Engineer.description: Bridges developers and the product — content, talks, open-source, and community.

seniority.mid: 2-5 yrs; owns conference strategy; flagship content.
seniority.senior: 5+ yrs; sets DevRel strategy; community lead; cross-org.

common_gaps: No engineering background — content lacks depth
